center.name: Geography of the Dominican Republic
center.summary: Geography of the Dominican Republic是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括La Selle thrush，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: There it is in the Sierra de Neiba and Cordillera Central. The species inhabits the understory of wet montane broadleaf evergreen forest and, at higher elevations, pine forest.{{cite book | last = | first = | title =Check-list of North American Birds | publisher =American Ornithologists' Union |edition =7th | date =1998 | location =Washington, D.C
